creator: lupe@lupe-christoph.de
text:
On Monday, 2008-08-11 at 04:37:07 +0800, Gea-Suan Lin wrote:
> On Sun, Aug 10, 2008 at 09:21:37PM +0200, Lupe Christoph wrote:

> > There is a Big Mistake in this patch - it removes some symlinks from
> > etc/munin and it removes etc/VERSION.node, ignoring
> > - that those symlinks may not exist on a machine where munin-node is
> >   installed,
> > - that there may be more symlinks that were not generated by the test
> >   installtion, both depending on presence and absence of hardware and
> >   software on both machines.
> > - that the symlinks are precious and should not be removed by an upgrade
> > - that VERSION.node is necessary for an upgrade to function.

> > I don't understand why the USE_PERL5 line had to be moved.

> USE_PERL5 doesn't be removed, it just been put after _DEPENDS by
> portlint's warning.

Now I do. Please note that I wrote "moved", not "removed".

Lupe Christoph
